name: codex-sshfs-bridge
description: Mirror VS Code SSH FS workspaces into a local folder that Codex CLI can use, then sync changes back to the remote workspace.

virtualWorkspaces.description: Provides commands that copy SSH FS virtual workspaces into a local mirror for Codex CLI and can push local mirror changes back to the remote workspace.

commands.title: Codex SSH FS Bridge: Sync Workspace to Local Mirror
Codex SSH FS Bridge: Open Local Mirror Workspace
Codex SSH FS Bridge: Sync Local Mirror Back to Remote
Codex SSH FS Bridge: Show Mirror Status

codexSshfsBridge.mirrorsRoot.markdownDescription: Optional absolute path for local mirrors. Leave blank to use `~/.codex-sshfs-bridge/mirrors`.

codexSshfsBridge.allowedSchemes.markdownDescription: URI schemes that should be treated as SSH FS-style workspaces.

codexSshfsBridge.autoPromptOnRemoteWorks.markdownDescription: Prompt to create a local mirror when a supported remote workspace is opened.

codexSshfsBridge.openMirrorAfterSync.markdownDescription: Open the generated local mirror workspace after a successful sync down.

codexSshfsBridge.maxFileSizeMb.markdownDescription: Skip files larger than this size during mirror sync operations.

scripts.check: npm run lint && npm run test
